essence: Creates and manipulates audio elements to enhance films, games, performances, and digital experiences.

identity.title: Sound Designer
identity.summary: Records, edits, and mixes sound effects, ambience, and audio layers to support storytelling and emotional impact.

salary.notes: Experienced designers in film, AAA games, or theatre can earn significantly more.

qualifications: Experience with audio editing and mixing software
Understanding of acoustics and sound theory
Creative problem‑solving and attention to detail
Ability to collaborate with directors and composers

lifestyle.description: Studio‑based with periods of intense project work; requires creativity, technical skill, and iterative refinement.

habits: Mixes audio for clarity and impact
